message:
fix: new rigs share HQ dolt_database for cross-db bead visibility (gt-42zaq)

When gt rig add creates a new rig without tracked beads, set dolt_database
to hq instead of the rig name. This ensures beads dispatched from HQ
(molecules, assigned work) are visible to bd ready, bd list, and other
commands that dont have cross-database routing.

Also protects EnsureAllMetadata from overwriting intentional shared-database
references by preserving existing dolt_database values that point to valid
different databases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
